title: Sifu Digital Deluxe Edition
description:
Sifu Digital Deluxe Edition
The Digital Deluxe edition of Sifu includes:

The base game

The “Art of Sifu” art book containing pages filled with sharp stylized paintings reminiscent of the culture and lifestyle of Kung Fu

The original soundtrack marrying traditional Chinese melodies with modern urban elements, composed by Howie Lee

Deluxe outfits to fight your enemies with style. Complete the required challenges in order to unlock them in-game

The Photo Mode Cinematic Pack giving you access to exclusive new filters & character poses
